title: PeninsulaCraft
description: The official modpack for the Peninsula MC private modded SMP server.
body:
The official modpack for the Peninsula MC private modded SMP server.

This modpack features a few tech mods, various mods and scripts to expand the early, mid, and late game, and many QOL mods.

The early game will have you scrounging for clay and flint to begin even the most basic of crafting recipes, requiring you to make use of some of Minecraft's underused resources. Your wooden tools will be much more useful, as Iron and even stone tools require more effort to obtain. The night cannot be skipped, meaning you WILL have to fortify

In the mid game, you will be experimenting with multiple tech mods, including Thermal Expansion, Mekanism, and Create, as well pursuing many creative endeavors involving photography and painting.

In the late game, you be looking to the stars...

PSA for new players — You will need flint, clay, and a campfire.

To join the Peninsula MC SMP, you have to be whitelisted. Contact me with your MC username if you want to join :)

Attributions:
The 1.20.1 version of Pam's Harvestcraft 2: Crops and Pam's Harvestcraft 2: Trees are not available on Modrinth so they are included as jar files. Credit for these mods go to Pamela Collins (MatrexsVigil) and Rhodox of the Painterly Pack. Including these mods are allowed as per the modpack permissions here:
  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops
  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-trees
  
Included is a slightly modified version of Shoulder Surfing by Exopandora (https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded). This modification was made to disable the incompatibility message about Valkyrien Skies. Shoulder Surfing is licensed under the MIT license which allows for modification and redistribution of the software as long as the MIT license is included (https://mit-license.org/)
